data.body: Plan-review PASS (advisory=7, signed). Triage: (1) cohort is a POST-PARSE dict augmentation on the finding out-dict (NOT a P1Finding schema field) — stamped in pass1_chunk (sorted chunk ids), pass1_container (sorted container ids), pass1_isf (['ISF']). (2) G6 major — also stamping the two synthetic _too_big DET paths (sizing.pass1_with_ladder + pass1._too_big_finding) whose cohort is deterministically known, so they aren't silently excluded from calibration. (3) _slim gains 'cohort' in its allowlist so it persists; missing cohort => 'unknown' (skipped) documented in the sidecar schema note. (4) AC4 contamination metric DEFINED: contamination_rate = (# blocking-tier findings whose cohort has >1 criterion, i.e. NOT reviewed in isolation) / (# blocking-tier findings with a non-null cohort); missing cohort is 'unknown' and excluded from the denominator. Committed as scripts/plan_review_contamination_rate.py + a test. Unblocks fort-wisp-wren. (5) eval_solver.py/criterion_preview.py just carry the extra key (their tests stay green).
